name: course_enrollment_system_online
description: The project has two parts deployed separately: - **Backend (API)** → [Railway](https://railway.app) — free tier available - **Frontend (React)** → [Vercel](https://vercel.com) — free tier available - **Database** → [MongoDB Atlas](https://cloud.mongodb.com) — free 512MB cluster

scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
